description:
cloudstack_vpn_customer_gateway

Creates a site to site VPN local customer gateway.
example_usage:
Basic usage:

resource "cloudstack_vpn_customer_gateway" "default" {
  name       = "test-vpc"
  cidr       = "10.0.0.0/8"
  esp_policy = "aes256-sha1;modp1024"
  gateway    = "192.168.0.1"
  ike_policy = "aes256-sha1;modp1024"
  ipsec_psk  = "terraform"
}

argument_reference.name: name
argument_reference.description: The name of the VPN Customer Gateway.

argument_reference.name: cidr
argument_reference.description: The CIDR block that needs to be routed through this gateway.

argument_reference.name: esp_policy
argument_reference.description: The ESP policy to use for this VPN Customer Gateway.

argument_reference.name: gateway
argument_reference.description: The public IP address of the related VPN Gateway.

argument_reference.name: ike_policy
argument_reference.description: The IKE policy to use for this VPN Customer Gateway.

argument_reference.name: ipsec_psk
argument_reference.description: The IPSEC pre-shared key used for this gateway.

argument_reference.name: dpd
argument_reference.description: If DPD is enabled for the related VPN connection (defaults false)

argument_reference.name: esp_lifetime
argument_reference.description: The ESP lifetime of phase 2 VPN connection to this VPN Customer Gateway in seconds (defaults 86400)

argument_reference.name: ike_lifetime
argument_reference.description: The IKE lifetime of phase 2 VPN connection to this VPN Customer Gateway in seconds (defaults 86400)

argument_reference.name: project
argument_reference.description: The name or ID of the project to create this VPN Customer Gateway in. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

attributes_reference.name: id
attributes_reference.description: The ID of the VPN Customer Gateway.

attributes_reference.name: dpd
attributes_reference.description: Enable or disable DPD is enabled for the related VPN connection.

attributes_reference.name: esp_lifetime
attributes_reference.description: The ESP lifetime of phase 2 VPN connection to this VPN Customer Gateway.

attributes_reference.name: ike_lifetime
attributes_reference.description: The IKE lifetime of phase 2 VPN connection to this VPN Customer Gateway.

import:
VPN customer gateways can be imported; use <VPN CUSTOMER GATEWAY ID> as the import ID. For example:

terraform import cloudstack_vpn_customer_gateway.default 741a7fca-1d05-4bb6-9290-1008300f0e5aWhen importing into a project you need to prefix the import ID with the project name:

terraform import cloudstack_vpn_customer_gateway.default my-project/741a7fca-1d05-4bb6-9290-1008300f0e5a
